description: Math log-family domain handling: log/log2/log10/log1p/acosh/atanh return NaN or -Infinity for out-of-domain inputs (negative, zero, |x|>=1 for atanh, x<1 for acosh) instead of garbage; NaN uses a printable pattern; positive-value identities unaffected

expect.stdout:
NaN -Infinity NaN
NaN -Infinity
NaN -Infinity
-Infinity NaN
NaN NaN NaN 0
NaN NaN Infinity -Infinity
true true true
